title: Nearby Events
description: Discover upcoming literary events in your area and connect with other book lovers.
searchPlaceholder: Search events by title, author or location.
bookCoverTooltip: Image of the book to be discussed

eventDetailExample.title: Book Club Meeting: "The Secret Garden"
eventDetailExample.description: Join our monthly book club for an enchanting evening discussing "The Secret Garden". We'll explore themes of friendship, nature, and personal transformation. The event is free and open to everyone. Don't forget to bring your copy of the book!

bookImageTooltip: Cover of the book to be discussed
eventFullDescription: Join our monthly book club for an enchanting evening discussing "The Secret Garden". We'll explore themes of friendship, nature, and personal transformation. The event is free and open to everyone. Don't forget to bring your copy of the book!

event1Description: Join us for a discussion about Frances Hodgson Burnett's classic novel. Share your thoughts and interpretations with fellow readers.
event1FullDescription: Join our monthly book club for an enchanting evening discussing "The Secret Garden". We'll explore themes of friendship, nature, and personal transformation. The event is free and open to everyone. Don't forget to bring your copy of the book!
event2Description: Meet Amelia Stone, author of "Whispers from the Past", as she shares her writing process and answers questions from the audience.
event2FullDescription: Amelia Stone, the acclaimed author of the "Whispers from the Past" series, will visit us for an intimate Q&A session. Discover her inspirations, creative process, and what the future holds. There will be a book signing at the end of the event.
eventclublecturavirtualDescription: Join us for a talk on "The Last Chronicle" with author Emily Carter.
eventclublecturavirtualFullDescription: Join us for a talk on "The Last Chronicle" with author Emily Carter. Discover the fascinating world of her latest novel and engage in an enriching discussion about literature and creativity.
